title: Exchange of Letters amending the Agreement for the Exchange of Money Orders (between Postal Administration of United Kingdom and Kuwait), signed at London and Kuwait on 24:11:1966 and 29:12:1966, in respect of the Channel Islands with effect from 01:10:1969 and the Isle of Man with effect from 05:07:1973. subject: POSTAL
